label: WBC Heavy Snow Discussion for Great Lakes

comments.text: This alarm set off everyone’s phones in the coffee shop; a barista told me she knew the word “squall” from the Canadian folk song “White Squall,” about an unpredictable deadly wave on the Great Lakes that can sweep an unwary mariner to his doom
